title: Add Pollinations AIGC Control Console to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Command center online
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! The Pollinations AIGC Control Console gives you a slick web dashboard to manage all your generative AI workflows in one place.
gist.summary: Added the Pollinations AIGC Control Console to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new web-based dashboard for managing their generative AI workflows.
gist.visual_concept: A retro control console or dashboard. Polly the bee acting as an operator at a desk with glowing buttons, alongside the Monitor Robot displaying a dashboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny headset, sitting at a retro control console with glowing buttons and screens. The chunky Monitor Robot stands nearby, its screen displaying a colorful dashboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
